prestazioni: Engine swap to a Jaguar XK6 4.2L (engine code: XK6-4.2) with a forged crankshaft (JE Pistons 3.562" stroke) and billet connecting rods (Manley H-beam, 6.125" length) for 8,000 RPM reliability, paired with a custom dry-sump oiling system (Aviaid 4-stage pump) to eliminate oil starvation in high-G corners.

Forced induction via a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (12 psi max boost) with a custom intercooler setup (PWR Australia bar-and-plate core, 4.5" thick) and a Tial MV-R 50mm wastegate to manage boost creep, mated to a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system (Jet-Hot coated, MagnaFlow mufflers) with equal-length headers (Stainless Works, 1.75" primaries).

Suspension overhaul with a full polybush kit (SuperPro 90-durometer) and adjustable coilovers (Öhlins Road & Track DFV, 2-way adjustable damping) paired with a custom front sway bar (Addco, 1.25" diameter) and rear panhard rod (Hotchkis) to eliminate axle tramp under hard acceleration.
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion (Duckwork Composites) including a one-piece front clip (hood + fenders), rear quarter panels, and trunk lid, reducing weight by ~120 lbs while retaining the original E-Type silhouette.

Custom widebody conversion (RML Group) with flared fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear) to accommodate 17x9" (front) and 17x11" (rear) BBS RS-GT wheels (ET20 front, ET35 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 295/35/17 rear).

Interior retrim with full Alcantara (Romo Automotive) including dashboard, door cards, and Recaro SPG XL seats (reclining mechanism removed for weight savings), paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede) and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages, T45 steel, 6-point) for chassis rigidity.
